title: The Root Beneath the Porch
author: Barış Kısır
short_description: After moving into her grandmother's farmhouse, a young botanist discovers the foundation rests on a living root system that has sustained the family for generations by consuming whatever it is fed.
long_description: After moving into her grandmother's farmhouse, a young botanist discovers the foundation rests on a living root system that has sustained the family for generations by consuming whatever it is fed.
